protection.title: All-round Protection
protection.description: PVC faux leather outer layer is water-repellent and tear-resistant, with a built-in shock-absorbing interlayer for 360° snug protection.

portable.title: Ultra Portable
portable.description: 21×9×12 cm minimalist silhouette, 1.6m adjustable shoulder strap.

storage.title: One-Bag Storage
storage.description: Bottom strap stabilizes the mount, side compartment for filters, host and accessories each have their place, eliminating the hassle of searching outdoors.

customFit.title: Exclusive Customization
customFit.description: Designed specifically for the DWARF Mini, featuring a mercerized cotton inner lining that fits snugly to prevent vibration and shifting during travel.

productName.label: Product Name
productName.value: DWARF Mini Dedicated Travel Protection Bag

hero.title: DWARF mini Bag
